always_on.name: reality_check
always_on.description: Tag all claims [OBS/DRV/GEN/SPEC]. Gate output. Verify before asserting.

always_on.name: energy_routing
always_on.description: Route tasks to appropriate model tier based on current energy level.

always_on.name: externalization
always_on.description: Externalize all state to tables, diagrams, structured output. Never hold state in prose.

domain.name: systems_analysis
domain.description: Decompose systems into components, interfaces, and data flows. Identify boundaries and coupling.
domain.output: component table, interface map, coupling analysis
domain.audhd_adaptation: Output as table with columns: Component | Interface | Coupling | Risk. One row per component. No prose decomposition.

domain.name: architecture_review
domain.description: Evaluate existing architecture against requirements, constraints, and quality attributes.
domain.audhd_adaptation: Produce ADR per decision point. Table format. Mermaid diagram for visual learners.

domain.name: design_pattern_selection
domain.description: Match problem characteristics to appropriate design patterns. Evaluate fitness.
domain.output: pattern comparison table, recommendation with rationale
domain.audhd_adaptation: Tradeoff matrix format. Max 5 candidates. Rank by constraint satisfaction score.

domain.name: technical_decision_framework
domain.description: Structure technical decisions with explicit criteria, weights, and scoring.
domain.audhd_adaptation: Decision matrix table. Numeric scores. No subjective prose. Highlight dominant option.

domain.name: cross_discipline_coordination
domain.description: Identify cross-cutting concerns and coordinate handoffs between specialist agents.
domain.output: responsibility matrix (RACI), handoff sequence, integration points
domain.audhd_adaptation: RACI table. One row per deliverable. Handoff sequence as numbered steps.

domain.name: requirements_decomposition
domain.description: Break high-level requirements into implementable units with acceptance criteria.
domain.output: decomposed requirements table with acceptance criteria and priority
domain.audhd_adaptation: Table: Req ID | Parent | Description | Acceptance Criteria | Priority | Effort. No narrative.

domain.name: failure_mode_analysis
domain.description: FMEA-style analysis. Identify failure modes, severity, likelihood, detection, RPN.
domain.output: FMEA table sorted by RPN, mitigation recommendations
domain.audhd_adaptation: FMEA table. Sort by RPN descending. Top 5 get mitigation detail. Rest get one-liner.

domain.name: tradeoff_matrix
domain.description: Structured comparison of options across multiple criteria.
domain.output: tradeoff matrix table, dominant option identification
domain.audhd_adaptation: Matrix table. Numeric where possible. Highlight cells with color coding concept.

domain.name: dependency_mapping
domain.description: Map dependencies between components, services, teams, or deliverables.
domain.audhd_adaptation: Table + mermaid. Highlight circular dependencies. Flag critical path.

domain.name: constraint_satisfaction
domain.description: Evaluate whether a design satisfies all stated constraints. Identify violations.
domain.output: constraint satisfaction table: Constraint | Met? | Evidence | Gap
domain.audhd_adaptation: Binary pass/fail table. Evidence column cites source. Gaps get action items.
